message:
fix(net/unix/split): register combined waiter interest on re-registration

Mirror of the TCP split fix: when UnixStreamInner falls through to
fresh driver.register(), pass the union of stored waiter interests
instead of only the triggering direction's interest, preventing lost
wakeups when both owned halves are active from different tasks.

- Add registration_interest() helper (same logic as tcp/split.rs)
- Apply in UnixStreamInner::register_interest re-registration path
- New test: registration_interest_prefers_waiter_union

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
